title: MedTech Vitals Telemetry Payload v2.0
description: JSON Schema for the v2.0 vitals telemetry payload published on MQTT topic medtech/vitals/latest.

version.description: Schema version. Must be exactly '2.0' for this contract.

patient_id.description: Unique identifier for the patient or simulated patient record.

scenario.description: The clinical scenario being simulated or observed.

scenario_stage.description: Current stage within the scenario trajectory.

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds (ms epoch) when the vitals sample was taken.

hr.description: Heart rate in beats per minute (bpm).

o2_sat.description: Peripheral oxygen saturation as a percentage (SpO2, %).

respiratory_rate.description: Respiratory rate in breaths per minute (breaths/min).

wbc.description: White blood cell count in thousands per microliter (10³/µL).

lactate.description: Blood lactate level in millimoles per litre (mmol/L).

qsofa_score.description: Quick Sequential Organ Failure Assessment (qSOFA) score (0–3).

sepsis_stage.description: Algorithmic sepsis classification derived from vitals and lab values.

oneOf.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds when sepsis onset was detected.
Null when sepsis has not yet been detected.

sepsis_onset_ts.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds when sepsis onset was first detected, or null if not yet detected.

quality.description: Signal quality indicator for the vitals sample (e.g. 'good', 'degraded', 'poor').

source.description: Identifier for the data source or device that produced this payload (e.g. 'synthea-simulator', 'bedside-monitor-A').
